Dashboard Theme
format:
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Rajdhani:wght@500;600;700&family=Source+Code+Pro:wght@500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --bg-base: #f3f6fb;
  --bg-overlay: #e4edf8;
  --panel: #ffffff;
  --ink: #112031;
  --muted: #5c6a79;
  --line: #d2deeb;
  --accent: #0f77c6;
  --accent-2: #f28e2b;
  --good: #138f60;
  --critical: #c0342f;
}

.nr-dashboard-theme md-content {
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 15% 15%, #f7fbff 0%, rgba(247,251,255,0) 28%),
    linear-gradient(140deg, var(--bg-base), var(--bg-overlay));
  font-family: 'Rajdhani', sans-serif;
  color: var(--ink);
}

.nr-dashboard-theme md-toolbar {
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #0f2a45, #1f4568);
  color: #f4f9ff;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardpanel {
  background: var(--panel);
  border: 1px solid var(--line);
  border-radius: 12px;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(10, 31, 54, 0.1);
  overflow: hidden;
  position: relative;
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardpanel:before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0 0 auto 0;
  height: 3px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-2));
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardtitle {
  font-family: 'Source Code Pro', monospace;
  color: #1d3552;
  font-size: 13px;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-text p,
.nr-dashboard-theme .value {
  color: var(--ink);
  font-weight: 600;
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-text .label {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-weight: 600;
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .status-pill {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 2px 10px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 12px;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  font-family: 'Source Code Pro', monospace;
  margin-right: 8px;
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .status-pill.normal {
  background: #e8f7f0;
  color: var(--good);
  border: 1px solid #b8e8d2;
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .status-pill.critical {
  background: #fdecea;
  color: var(--critical);
  border: 1px solid #f6bbb6;
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .status-message {
  color: #2d455f;
}

.nr-dashboard-theme md-slider .md-thumb,
.nr-dashboard-theme md-slider .md-track.md-track-fill {
  background-color: var(--accent);
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-chart text {
  fill: #2f4c69;
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-chart .chart-container {
  border-radius: 10px;
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-toast {
  border-radius: 10px;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardpanel {
  animation: panel-in 320ms ease both;
}

@keyframes panel-in {
  from { transform: translateY(6px); opacity: 0; }
  to { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; }
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .nr-dashboard-theme md-toolbar {
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    font-size: 15px;
  }

  .nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardpanel {
    border-radius: 10px;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(10, 31, 54, 0.1);
  }
}

@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  .nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardpanel {
    animation: none;
  }
}
</style>
